ocr_findings.description: Image shows a full tree-structure diagram of file/directory hierarchy with labels (ルートディレクトリ, 音楽, 画像, 高解像度, file names). OCR captures only '- ファイルやディレクトリの指定' as a caption; diagram content itself is not transcribed (image placeholder). Diagram labels are meaningful but their loss is low severity as the surrounding body text explains the structure verbally.

reviewer_notes: Page covers learning-point sidebar on English word meanings (Root/Current), path-based file specification section, and パスとは definition. All body text captured faithfully. Tree diagram labels not OCR'd (image placeholder) — low severity as text explanation is complete. Page number '410' appears at top of OCR output as first line, cosmetic.
